Extremely disappointed with the Galaxy Watch 8 Classic I purchased directly from Samsung. The battery barely lasts 12 hours — nowhere near what was advertised. I requested a return less than 48 hours after receiving it and still no proper resolution.
I trusted Samsung for quality, but this product has been a complete letdown. If this issue isn’t resolved immediately, I’ll make sure to share my experience across all platforms. This is unacceptable for a premium device from a global brand like Samsung."

text:
إلى: إدارة سامسونج مصر Samsung 
​الموضوع: شكوى بخصوص سوء تقييم فني وإصلاح شاشة تلفزيون سامسونج
​الاسم: سعد علي زكي 
رقم الهاتف: 01226909430
رقم الشكوى/البلاغ الأصلي: ٤٢٨٧٨٠٦٤٥١
رقم طراز الشاشة: سامسونج 58 بوصة 4K، إصدار 7000
تاريخ الشراء: [10\6\2024]
​السادة/السيدات،
​أتقدم إليكم بهذه الشكوى بخصوص مشكلة فنية في شاشتي من نوع سامسونج 58 بوصة 4K، إصدار 7000، التي ما زالت تحت الضمان (لم تكمل سنة).
​قمت بتقديم بلاغ بوجود عطل في الشاشة، وعلى إثره، تم إرسال فني تابع لمركز الصيانة لفحص الجهاز. بعد معاينة سريعة، قام الفني بتسجيل تقرير غير صحيح يزعم فيه أن العطل ناتج عن "مياه نار" أو "سوء استخدام" من جانبي.
​أود أن أوضح أن هذا الادعاء لا أساس له من الصحة، حيث أن الشاشة سليمة تمامًا من الخارج ولا تظهر عليها أي آثار لحروق أو تلف من أي نوع، وهو ما ينفي تمامًا ادعاء الفني.
​بناءً على ما سبق، أطالب بما يلي:
​إرسال فني آخر متخصص من سامسونج لإعادة فحص الشاشة وتقييم العطل بشكل محايد وصحيح.
​إصلاح العطل تحت بند الضمان، حيث أن المشكلة لم تنتج عن سوء استخدام، وهو ما يؤكده حال الشاشة الخارجي.
​آمل أن يتم التعامل مع هذه الشكوى بجدية وسرعة، وأن أحصل على خدمة عادلة تتناسب مع سمعة شركة سامسونج.
​أنتظر ردكم وتحديد موعد لزيارة فنية جديدة في أقرب وقت.
​مع خالص الشكر والتقدير،
​الاسم: [ سعد علي زكي محمد ]@Samsung

text:
Samsung warranty is horrible!!!! if your phone has been determined to need replacement by 2 different techs, a third party and a samsung tech at a service center, they won't send you a loaner while your phone gets sent back to headquarters. They used to! Not anymore though. So for however long they have your phone, you're SOL nor do they replace your phone for you. Horrible customer values. My phone is less than 6 months old and still under warranty.   I used to be soo pro-Samsung but wow. This company policy sucks. With Apple they replace your phone right away. They have authorized service centers EVERYWHERE! Samsung only has 1 in California and even though they told me to get a new phone, Samsung won't and the phone has to be sent in and examined by another tech "at headquarters" for further assistance and during this whole thing, I am without a phone.   Apple has waaayyy better customer service and care more about their customers. I am so disappointed and upset at your lack of customer service and satisfaction. 

Samsung

Samsung Electronics 
Samsung Business USA 
Apple LG전자 my family and I are ready to switch appliances and electronics.

text: Bonjour a vous . Je suis Canadien. j'ai une tablette Galaxy tab s6 lite achetée en janvier 2022 , depuis ce matin ( maintenant 6  mois ) l'écran est gelé en mode de démarrage. J'ai bien essayé de la redémarrer en appuyant sur le bouton on off et le bouton bas volume , sans succès . téléphoner au service a la clientèle pour me faire dire que outre d'aller voir un service de réparation a mes frais , pour moi une tablette de ce prix doit avoir une durée de vie plus grande. J'ai toujours eu des produits électronique Samsung , tv , cellulaire ( s5 , s7 , s10 , et maintenant s21 ) , tablette s2 ( toujours satisfait sauf n'est plus au gout du jour ) Si je n'ai pas satisfaction avec cette tablette je n'achèterais plus de produit Samsung de peur que le produit ne fasse que 3 ans maximum . merci a l'avance . Malheureusement je n'ai pas de service adéquat dans mon pays.

text: Bonjour a vous . Je suis Canadien. j'ai une tablette Galaxy tab s6 lite achetée en janvier 2022 , depuis ce matin ( maintenant 6  mois ) l'écran est gelé en mode de démarrage. J'ai bien essayé de la redémarrer en appuyant sur le bouton on off et le bouton bas volume , sans succès . téléphoner au service a la clientèle pour me faire dire que outre d'aller voir un service de réparation a mes frais , pour moi une tablette de ce prix doit avoir une durée de vie plus grande. J'ai toujours eu des produits électronique Samsung , tv , cellulaire ( s5 , s7 , s10 , et maintenant s21 ) , tablette s2 ( toujours satisfait sauf n'est plus au gout du jour ) Si je n'ai pas satisfaction avec cette tablette je n'achèterais plus de produit Samsung de peur que le produit ne fasse que 3 ans maximum . merci a l'avance . Malheureusement je n'ai pas de service adéquat dans mon pays.

text: I do not advise buying Samsung products, especially smart TVs, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply no longer appears. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its lifespan. Recent tests indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in that group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company.

Meanwhile, local stores like T-Mobile in Baghdad offer better deals and much better service. Samsung really needs to reconsider how it operates in Iraq.

text: Bonjour a vous . Je suis Canadien. j'ai une tablette Galaxy tab s6 lite achetée en janvier 2022 , depuis ce matin ( maintenant 5 mois ) l'écran est gelé en mode de démarrage. J'ai bien essayé de la redémarrer en appuyant sur le bouton on off et le bouton bas volume , sans succès . téléphoner au service a la clientèle pour me faire dire que outre d'aller voir un service de réparation a mes frais , pour moi une tablette de ce prix doit avoir une durée de vie plus grande. J'ai toujours eu des produits électronique Samsung , tv , cellulaire ( s5 , s7 , s10 , et maintenant s21 ) , tablette s2 ( toujours satisfait sauf n'est plus au gout du jour ) Si je n'ai pas satisfaction avec cette tablette je n'achèterais plus de produit Samsung de peur que le produit ne fasse que 3 ans maximum . merci a l'avance . Malheureusement je n'ai pas de service adéquat dans mon pays.

Samsung updated their cover photo.
text:
Não aconselho comprarem  produtos da marca Samsung principalmente smartv, pois sua durabilidade é questionável e, em muitos casos, descartável. Comprei uma TV QLED 4K Q65B em fevereiro de 2022 e, atualmente, com menos de dois anos de uso, já estou enfrentando problemas; a imagem simplesmente não aparece mais. É frustrante investir mais de três mil reais em um produto e não ter certeza sobre sua vida útil.
Testes recentes indicaram que a tecnologia ELED pode atingir temperaturas superiores a 100 graus, resultando em falhas na tela. Recebi uma ligação da Samsung, onde fui informado de que algumas smart TVs realmente apresentaram problemas, mas a minha, que é QLED, não estava incluída nesse grupo. A única diferença entre a ELED e a QLED da Samsung é uma camada de pontos quânticos, enquanto a posição dos LEDs permanece a mesma, o que não justifica a informação fornecida pela empresa.

text:
Service order no : 4286413599
Name: Abdulaziz
Date of Complaint Submission: 24/06/2025
Subject of Complaint: Malfunction in Samsung Fold 6 – Touch screen not working
Service Location: Samsung Service Center – Al Babtain, The Avenues
Issue Location: Samsung Al Babtain – Hawalli Branch
Date of Incident: 18/06/2024
Concerned Staff Member: Ms. Rasha – Department Supervisor
Details of the Complaint:
I visited the Samsung service center under the Al Babtain agency regarding a malfunction in the touch screen of my Samsung Fold 6 device. I was informed that the repair cost would be 146 KWD and that the device is not covered under warranty due to minor scratches, despite still being within the warranty period.
Following this, I submitted a complaint to the Consumer Protection Department. As a result, a resolution was reached whereby I would receive a 50% discount on the repair cost. I agreed to this resolution and submitted the device for repair.
However, after handing over the device, I was surprised to find that it was not repaired. The service center claimed that the repair now costs approximately 190 KWD and alleged that I refused the repair, although I was never contacted nor informed of any changes. When I followed up in person, they stated that they had not received any response from Samsung's headquarters, which contradicts the agreement that was made.
Request:
I request that the agency honors the original agreement, and proceeds with repairing the device with the 50% discount as agreed upon, without holding the customer accountable for any internal miscommunications or lack of follow-up.
Sincerely,
Complainant: Abdulaziz
Email: abdlazez2222@gmail.com

São ladrões e a ASAE é uma mentira e só servem para dar cobertura aos ladrões, reclamei e nem resposta me deram.
Pais de ladrões, pátria corrupta, terra de bandidos.
Não comprem Samsung , comprem Huawei, metade do preço e qualidade superior, e eles não fogem e assumem a reparação dos aparelhos, comprei um Flip 5, bem me avisaram que os ecrãs dobráveis da Samsung (Portugal) só davam barraca, fiquei sem telemóvel praticamente novo, fui roubado pela multinacional Samsung.

text: Bonjour a vous . Je suis Canadien. j'ai une tablette Galaxy tab s6 lite achetée en janvier 2022 , depuis ce matin ( maintenant 4 mois ) l'écran est gelé en mode de démarrage. J'ai bien essayé de la redémarrer en appuyant sur le bouton on off et le bouton bas volume , sans succès . téléphoner au service a la clientèle pour me faire dire que outre d'aller voir un service de réparation a mes frais , pour moi une tablette de ce prix doit avoir une durée de vie plus grande. J'ai toujours eu des produits électronique Samsung , tv , cellulaire ( s5 , s7 , s10 , et maintenant s21 ) , tablette s2 ( toujours satisfait sauf n'est plus au gout du jour ) Si je n'ai pas satisfaction avec cette tablette je n'achèterais plus de produit Samsung de peur que le produit ne fasse que 3 ans maximum . merci a l'avance

This riddle describes a foldable smartphone, specifically pointing to a device with:

Two screens

Foldable design (slim when closed, wide when opened)

Versatile use ("I work, I play")

Given these clues, the most fitting answer is:

Samsung Galaxy Z Fold (or more generally, a foldable phone like the Galaxy Z Fold series).

💡 Let's break it down:

"I unfold, I flex" → References the folding screen and hinge mechanism

"I work, I play" → Highlights multitasking and entertainment capabilities

"Two screens, one power - all in one day." → The cover screen + main foldable screen

"Slim like a bar when closed in hand" → Like a standard phone when folded

"But opens wide, like no phone can." → Transforms into a tablet-like display

✅ Answer: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold (or a foldable smartphone)

text:
Service order no : 4286413599
Name: Abdulaziz
Date of Complaint Submission: 24/06/2025
Subject of Complaint: Malfunction in Samsung Fold 6 – Touch screen not working
Service Location: Samsung Service Center – Al Babtain, The Avenues
Issue Location: Samsung Al Babtain – Hawalli Branch
Date of Incident: 18/06/2024
Concerned Staff Member: Ms. Rasha – Department Supervisor
Details of the Complaint:
I visited the Samsung service center under the Al Babtain agency regarding a malfunction in the touch screen of my Samsung Fold 6 device. I was informed that the repair cost would be 146 KWD and that the device is not covered under warranty due to minor scratches, despite still being within the warranty period.
Following this, I submitted a complaint to the Consumer Protection Department. As a result, a resolution was reached whereby I would receive a 50% discount on the repair cost. I agreed to this resolution and submitted the device for repair.
However, after handing over the device, I was surprised to find that it was not repaired. The service center claimed that the repair now costs approximately 190 KWD and alleged that I refused the repair, although I was never contacted nor informed of any changes. When I followed up in person, they stated that they had not received any response from Samsung's headquarters, which contradicts the agreement that was made.
Request:
I request that the agency honors the original agreement, and proceeds with repairing the device with the 50% discount as agreed upon, without holding the customer accountable for any internal miscommunications or lack of follow-up.
Sincerely,
Complainant: Abdulaziz
Email: abdlazez2222@gmail.com

text: Bonjour a vous . Je suis Canadien. j'ai une tablette Galaxy tab s6 lite achetée en janvier 2022 , depuis ce matin ( maintenant 4 mois ) l'écran est gelé en mode de démarrage. J'ai bien essayé de la redémarrer en appuyant sur le bouton on off et le bouton bas volume , sans succès . téléphoner au service a la clientèle pour me faire dire que outre d'aller voir un service de réparation a mes frais , pour moi une tablette de ce prix doit avoir une durée de vie plus grande. J'ai toujours eu des produits électronique Samsung , tv , cellulaire ( s5 , s7 , s10 , et maintenant s21 ) , tablette s2 ( toujours satisfait sauf n'est plus au gout du jour ) Si je n'ai pas satisfaction avec cette tablette je n'achèterais plus de produit Samsung de peur que le produit ne fasse que 3 ans maximum . merci a l'avance

معاناتي مع شركة سامسونج samsung
https://www.facebook.com/SamsungEgypt
https://www.samsung.com/eg/
السيد رئيس الجنهوريه
السيد رئيس الوزراء
السيد رئيس جهاز حماية المستهلك
السيد / رئيس مصلحة الرقابه الصناعيه 
التلاعب بالمواطن المصري
الساده الأفاضل 
اليست الدوله هي من تضمن حقوق المواطن المصري من التلاعب به من الشركات العامله في الدوله وخصوصآ شركات ومصانع الأجهزه الكهربائيه وبالأخص شركة سامسونج التي ترفض صيانة ثلاجه قيمتها تتعدى اليوم ٤٠٠٠٠ ج ويطالبوني بقبول مبلغ ٨٥٠٠ ج كتعويض وعلي أن اتكبد وادفع مبلغ ٣٢٠٠٠ ج لشراء ثلاجه جديده في ظل الظروف الاقتصاديه التي نمر بها
الساده الأفاضل 
الشركات الأجنبيه تتلاعب بالمستهلك وتستحل حقه وتماطله وتكبده أعباء إضافيه على أعباءه وتتعامل معه كمواطن درجه عاشره تفعل به ماتشاء ومايحلوا لها وتكبده خسائر وتستغل احتياجه للسلعه
الساده الافاضل
هل من المنطقي ان شركه ترفض صيانة جهاز لعدم توفر قطعة الغيار لديها نظرآ لأنها أوقفت انتاج هذا الموديل وفي نفس الوقت لايوجد منفذ آخر لشراء هذه القطعه لأنه لايتم انتاجها مع العلم ان هناك بنود في القانون تلزم هذه الشركات بتوفير قطع غيار منتجاتها 
وفي المقابل يتكبد المواطن شراء ثلاجه جديده تتعدى ال ٤٠٠٠٠ ج 
انا كمواطن بدأت اشعر ان هذه الشركه ( سامسونج) فوق القانون او أنها تتعامل مع المستهلك بهذا المبدأ وتحاول فرض سياسة أنها الأقوى والمستهلك هو الأضعف
ارجو مساعدتي في الحصول على حقي واعادة النظر في أساليب الرقابه على الشركات والتزامها بتوفير قطع غيار منتجاتها ( طبقآ للقانون )
هل من المعقول ياساده ان جهاز ثلاجه سامسونج انتاج ٢٠١٦ ليس له قطع غيار والشركه تلزمني بدفع ٤٠٠٠٠ لشراء ثلاجه جديده 
اليس قانون حماية المستهلك يحمي حقوقنا في توفير قطع الغيار اللازمه للمنتجات التي قمنا بشراءها من ماركات معتمده
هل من المعقول ان يقوم المواطن بشراء ثلاجه ب ٤٠٠٠٠ ج كل خمس سنوات
هل هذه سياسه بيعيه جديده من الشركات لزيادة ارباحها على حساب المواطن

text:
Service order no : 4286413599
Name: Abdulaziz
Date of Complaint Submission: 24/06/2025
Subject of Complaint: Malfunction in Samsung Fold 6 – Touch screen not working
Service Location: Samsung Service Center – Al Babtain, The Avenues
Issue Location: Samsung Al Babtain – Hawalli Branch
Date of Incident: 18/06/2024
Concerned Staff Member: Ms. Rasha – Department Supervisor
Details of the Complaint:
I visited the Samsung service center under the Al Babtain agency regarding a malfunction in the touch screen of my Samsung Fold 6 device. I was informed that the repair cost would be 146 KWD and that the device is not covered under warranty due to minor scratches, despite still being within the warranty period.
Following this, I submitted a complaint to the Consumer Protection Department. As a result, a resolution was reached whereby I would receive a 50% discount on the repair cost. I agreed to this resolution and submitted the device for repair.
However, after handing over the device, I was surprised to find that it was not repaired. The service center claimed that the repair now costs approximately 190 KWD and alleged that I refused the repair, although I was never contacted nor informed of any changes. When I followed up in person, they stated that they had not received any response from Samsung's headquarters, which contradicts the agreement that was made.
Request:
I request that the agency honors the original agreement, and proceeds with repairing the device with the 50% discount as agreed upon, without holding the customer accountable for any internal miscommunications or lack of follow-up.
Sincerely,
Complainant: Abdulaziz
Email: abdlazez2222@gmail.com

text:
Samsung Samsung Electronics Samsung Global

Why should I pay to fix a problem that originated from Samsung’s own manufacturing fault?

I’m extremely disappointed with the quality and service I received from Samsung.
I purchased a Samsung TV in November 2024 from Sharaf DG Dubai for almost USD 2,000. It was delivered in November 2024.

In December 2025, just about 12 months & 25 days after delivery, the TV suddenly developed a vertical line in the middle of the screen — with no damage, no impact, and no misuse. This clearly looks like a manufacturing defect.
I reported the issue on 23 December 2025 to both Sharaf DG and Samsung.
After a two‑month delay, Samsung finally contacted me in February — only to tell me the repair would cost (around AED 2,450) because its just 25 days after the warranty expired,.

Half the price of the TV… for a defect that appeared in just one year.
To make things worse, Samsung then offered me a trade‑in value of AED 30 for the defective TV.
Yes, USD 8 for a product I paid USD 2,000 for, which failed just after the first year.
This is unacceptable for a brand like Samsung.

We buy Samsung for reliability — not for a premium TV to fail within 12 months and then be told to pay half its price to repair it.
I feel completely let down and misled by this experience.
I request Samsung to take responsibility for what appears to be a manufacturing defect and provide a proper solution — either a full repair or a replacement.

@SamsungGulf @SamsungMEA @SamsungSupport

I hope you take this matter seriously.

text:
MAGA व्यवसाय प्रस्ताव

सम्माननीय: डोनाल्ड जे. ट्रंप
प्रस्तुतकर्ता: Adi Kailash Dhaam 

---

कार्यकारी सारांश

यह प्रस्ताव MAGA (Make America Great Again) ब्रांड को एक मजबूत व्यावसायिक साम्राज्य में बदलने की रणनीति प्रस्तुत करता है। MAGA ब्रांड की व्यापक पहचान और प्रभाव का लाभ उठाकर, हम इसे प्रौद्योगिकी, मीडिया, वित्त और उपभोक्ता वस्तुओं सहित विभिन्न उद्योगों में विस्तारित करना चाहते हैं।

हमारी दृष्टि और मिशन

दृष्टि: MAGA को एक विश्वव्यापी, राजस्व-सृजन करने वाले उद्यम में बदलना और इसके मूल मूल्यों – देशभक्ति, आर्थिक समृद्धि और अमेरिकी श्रेष्ठता – को मजबूत करना।

मिशन: उच्च गुणवत्ता वाले, अमेरिका-प्रथम उत्पाद और सेवाएँ बनाना जो MAGA आंदोलन के समर्थकों के साथ गहराई से जुड़ें और बड़े पैमाने पर राजस्व उत्पन्न करें।

प्रस्तावित MAGA व्यावसायिक पहल

1. MAGA मीडिया नेटवर्क

उद्देश्य: एक मजबूत रूढ़िवादी मीडिया साम्राज्य बनाना।

MAGA न्यूज़ – एक डिजिटल और टीवी समाचार चैनल जो निष्पक्ष और सच्ची पत्रकारिता प्रदान करेगा।

MAGA सोशल – एक फ्री-स्पीच आधारित सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म।

MAGA पॉडकास्ट – ट्रंप समर्थित आवाजों से विशेष साक्षात्कार और कमेंट्री।

2. MAGA टेक्नोलॉजी और AI

उद्देश्य: बिग टेक से प्रतिस्पर्धा करना और डिजिटल युग में अभिव्यक्ति की स्वतंत्रता सुनिश्चित करना।

MAGA AI – एक AI-आधारित मंच जो सेंसरशिप मुक्त सामग्री प्रदान करेगा।

MAGA क्लाउड – एक अमेरिकी-स्वामित्व वाली क्लाउड स्टोरेज सेवा।

MAGA साइबर सुरक्षा – व्यवसायों और व्यक्तियों को डिजिटल खतरों से बचाने के लिए।

3. MAGA वित्तीय सेवाएँ

उद्देश्य: एक मजबूत, अमेरिका-प्रथम वित्तीय पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र का निर्माण।

MAGA बैंक – अमेरिकी छोटे व्यवसायों का समर्थन करने वाला वित्तीय संस्थान।

MAGA क्रिप्टो – विकेंद्रीकृत वित्तीय प्रणाली के लिए एक ब्लॉकचेन समाधान।

MAGA गोल्ड – एक सोने-समर्थित निवेश मंच।

4. MAGA उपभोक्ता वस्तुएँ और जीवनशैली

उद्देश्य: देशभक्तों के लिए उच्च गुणवत्ता वाले, अमेरिका-निर्मित उत्पाद उपलब्ध कराना।

MAGA वियर – प्रीमियम परिधान और एक्सेसरीज़।

MAGA एनर्जी – एक ऊर्जादायक पेय ब्रांड।

MAGA होम्स – अमेरिकी परिवारों के लिए किफायती आवास परियोजनाएँ।

5. MAGA नौकरियाँ और शिक्षा

उद्देश्य: अमेरिकी श्रमिकों और उद्यमियों को सशक्त बनाना।

MAGA जॉब्स – एक रूढ़िवादी-अनुकूल नौकरी पोर्टल।

MAGA अकादमी – भविष्य के उद्यमियों के लिए व्यावसायिक और नेतृत्व प्रशिक्षण।

MAGA ट्रेड्स – उच्च मांग वाली व्यावसायिक नौकरियों के लिए व्यावसायिक प्रशिक्षण।

राजस्व और मुद्रीकरण रणनीति

सदस्यता मॉडल – MAGA न्यूज़, MAGA क्लाउड, MAGA अकादमी।

विज्ञापन और साझेदारी – रूढ़िवादी-अनुकूल व्यवसायों से प्रायोजन।

ई-कॉमर्स बिक्री – MAGA वियर, MAGA एनर्जी, और अन्य उत्पाद।

प्रीमियम सेवाएँ – वित्तीय और तकनीकी समाधान।

ट्रंप संगठन के साथ रणनीतिक साझेदारी

हम ट्रंप संगठन के साथ सीधी साझेदारी का प्रस्ताव रखते हैं, जिसमें ब्रांडिंग, निवेश और प्रचार समर्थन शामिल होगा। यह अधिकतम पहुंच, विश्वसनीयता और लाभप्रदता सुनिश्चित करेगा।

निष्कर्ष

MAGA आंदोलन के व्यापक समर्थन का लाभ उठाकर, हम इसे एक अरब-डॉलर का साम्राज्य बना सकते हैं, जबकि उन मूल्यों को बनाए रख सकते हैं जिन्हें लाखों अमेरिकी संजोते हैं। आपकी नेतृत्व क्षमता और प्रभाव के साथ, हम MAGA को राजनीति से परे ले जाकर एक स्थायी विरासत बना सकते हैं।

आइए, अमेरिका को फिर से महान बनाएं – व्यवसाय, मीडिया, प्रौद्योगिकी और उससे आगे!

आगे की प्रक्रिया:

हम इस प्रस्ताव पर चर्चा करने और संभावित निवेश अवसरों का पता लगाने के लिए एक बैठक निर्धारित करना चाहेंगे।

प्रस्तुतकर्ता: Maa Nanda Dhaam

text:
Lately, Samsung’s S series has been struggling with photo quality when posting on Facebook. While the camera captures excellent images and they look great in the gallery, the issue arises when uploading them in Facebook, which significantly reduces the quality.

I personally experienced this when a friend requested photos taken with my Samsung device and transferred them to her iPhone. When she posted them on Facebook using her iPhone, the quality remained excellent, unlike when uploaded from my Samsung.

After a decade of using Samsung, I’m seriously considering switching to an iPhone. What’s going on, Samsung? This issue has persisted from the S22 to the S24. 🥺 Just so sad that nice captured photos turned blurred in FB. Now the point is useless because photos posted in social media are poor.

Hope you can do something about it. 🙏🥺😞😓

text: I will no longer purchase Samsung brand products, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply doesn't appear anymore. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its useful life. Recent tests have indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in this group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company. I have no doubt about the position of Samsung Brazil, I am only doing my role as a consumer to inform people that Samsung smart TVs do not have durability and also do not have a useful life. Unfortunately, I am having a very negative experience with Samsung.

text:
Subject: Complaint Regarding Display Issue in Samsung Galaxy S22 Plus Post Software Update

Sir,

1. I am the owner of Samsung Galaxy S22 Plus smartphone bearing IMEI No:352497332883802
purchased the above phone on 20.07.2023.Despite being a loyal Samsung Customer, I am
deeply disappointed by the recent issue I have encountered with my device, which I believe
stems from the manufacturing or software-related fault.

2. Following the installation of a routine software update pushed by Samsung on 13.02. 2025, the
phone's display began exhibiting prominent pink line, rendering it nearly unusable for normal
purposes. This issue arose immediately after the update, directly pointing to a defect caused by
Samsung's software, which the hardware was evidently not built to handle

3. On 04.03.2025, I visited your authorized service center, located at Turney's samsung cafe kunnamkulam, Thrissur,  Initially, I was assured that the display defect would be addressed free of cost,
However, I was later informed that the repair would cost Rs.10,600/- (Ten  Thousand six hundred only) as the device was out of warranty. The above service
center has also issued me with a detailed estimate for the same. Though I have reached out to
Samsung customer support multiple times, despite assurances, no satisfactory resolution has
been provided. The defect caused by your software update remains unaddressed, causing me
significant inconvenience.

4. It is submitted that my phone has not suffered any physical damage till date and was functioning
properly until the software update. The afore-said defect is a result of a flaw in Samsung's
design or software, for which I am not responsible. A phone built without adequate capacity to
handle future software updates is a clear example of manufacturing negligence and defect. It is
unjust and unreasonable to demand payment for repairing an issue caused solely by Samsung's
own software update. Despite multiple attempts to seek resolution, he delay and lack of
accountability have caused significant mental stress and inconvenience. Apart from that, it is
held by various Consumer Dispute Redressal Commission that the manufacturer is responsible
for the defect (exhibiting vertical lines) caused by the software update, regardless of the device's
warranty status.

Hence I humbly request your good office to repair or replace the defective display of my device.
free of cost, without any delay, as the issue was caused by Samsung's own actions. I trust that Samsung
will handle this matter with the urgency and fairness it deserves, in line with its reputation for customer
satisfaction. Please respond within 7 days of receiving this complaint. If no action is taken within this
time, I will be compelled to seek legal remedies or escalate the matter to consumer forums for redressal.

Yours faithfully

text: I will no longer purchase Samsung brand products, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply doesn't appear anymore. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its useful life. Recent tests have indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in this group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company. I have no doubt about the position of Samsung Brazil, I am only doing my role as a consumer to inform people that Samsung smart TVs do not have durability and also do not have a useful life. Unfortunately, I am having a very negative experience with Samsung.

text:
Subject: Complaint Regarding Display Issue in Samsung Galaxy S22 Plus Post Software Update

Sir,

1. I am the owner of Samsung Galaxy S22 Plus smartphone bearing IMEI No:352497332883802
purchased the above phone on 20.07.2023.Despite being a loyal Samsung Customer, I am
deeply disappointed by the recent issue I have encountered with my device, which I believe
stems from the manufacturing or software-related fault.

2. Following the installation of a routine software update pushed by Samsung on 13.02. 2025, the
phone's display began exhibiting prominent pink line, rendering it nearly unusable for normal
purposes. This issue arose immediately after the update, directly pointing to a defect caused by
Samsung's software, which the hardware was evidently not built to handle

3. On **********, I visited your authorized service center, located at Turney's samsung cafe kunnamkulam, Thrissur,  Initially, I was assured that the display defect would be addressed free of cost,
However, I was later informed that the repair would cost Rs.10,600/- (Ten  Thousand six hundred only) as the device was out of warranty. The above service
center has also issued me with a detailed estimate for the same. Though I have reached out to
Samsung customer support multiple times, despite assurances, no satisfactory resolution has
been provided. The defect caused by your software update remains unaddressed, causing me
significant inconvenience.

4. It is submitted that my phone has not suffered any physical damage till date and was functioning
properly until the software update. The afore-said defect is a result of a flaw in Samsung's
design or software, for which I am not responsible. A phone built without adequate capacity to
handle future software updates is a clear example of manufacturing negligence and defect. It is
unjust and unreasonable to demand payment for repairing an issue caused solely by Samsung's
own software update. Despite multiple attempts to seek resolution, he delay and lack of
accountability have caused significant mental stress and inconvenience. Apart from that, it is
held by various Consumer Dispute Redressal Commission that the manufacturer is responsible
for the defect (exhibiting vertical lines) caused by the software update, regardless of the device's
warranty status.

Hence I humbly request your good office to repair or replace the defective display of my device.
free of cost, without any delay, as the issue was caused by Samsung's own actions. I trust that Samsung
will handle this matter with the urgency and fairness it deserves, in line with its reputation for customer
satisfaction. Please respond within 7 days of receiving this complaint. If no action is taken within this
time, I will be compelled to seek legal remedies or escalate the matter to consumer forums for redressal.

Yours faithfully

text: I had a truly terrible experience with Samsung . I sent my S21+ in for repair, due to having lines on screen. When I sent the phone in, Samsung mentioned that the screen will be a free replacement. However, I will need to pay for any other parts that is faulty. I agreed to this T&C. After a few days, Samsung called me and mentioned that there are water stains in my phone, and I will need to pay SGD800+ for the repair, else I will need to forfeit the SGD54.50 service fee which I have paid. I got a shock upon hearing this. I told Samsung that the phone is still functioning properly, why should I pay SGD800+ for the repair? Samsung mentioned that it doesn't matter if the phone is or not. There is water stains in the phone which causes the Samsung phone test to fail, and regardless of whether the phone is functioning properly, Samsung will have to replace the motherboard of the phone and it costs SGD800+. Fyi, I did not drop the phone into water at all, and I do not know how the water stains came about. I agreeable to pay for the repair of any part that is faulty, but I am not agreeable to pay for parts that are still functioning, but just that there are water stains which make the Samsung test fail. Why should I pay to make my phone pass the Samsung test? I just want the phone to be working that's all, and the only part that needs to be replaced is the screen. In the end, I did not get my phone repaired and went to make a police report for this. This is a fraud and Samsung is trying to ask customers to pay for unnecessary repair.

text: I will no longer purchase Samsung brand products, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply doesn't appear anymore. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its useful life. Recent tests have indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in this group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company. I have no doubt about the position of Samsung Brazil, I am only doing my role as a consumer to inform people that Samsung smart TVs do not have durability and also do not have a useful life. Unfortunately, I am having a very negative experience with Samsung Global.

text:
Não pretendo mais adquirir produtos da marca Samsung, pois sua durabilidade é questionável e, em muitos casos, descartável. Comprei uma TV QLED 4K Q65B em fevereiro de 2022 e, atualmente, com menos de dois anos de uso, já estou enfrentando problemas; a imagem simplesmente não aparece mais. É frustrante investir mais de três mil reais em um produto e não ter certeza sobre sua vida útil.
Testes recentes indicaram que a tecnologia ELED pode atingir temperaturas superiores a 100 graus, resultando em falhas na tela. Recebi uma ligação da Samsung, onde fui informado de que algumas smart TVs realmente apresentaram problemas, mas a minha, que é QLED, não estava incluída nesse grupo. A única diferença entre a ELED e a QLED da Samsung é uma camada de pontos quânticos, enquanto a posição dos LEDs permanece a mesma, o que não justifica a informação fornecida pela empresa.
Não tenho dúvidas da posição da Samsung Brasil, só estou fazendo meu papel de consumidor de informar as pessoas que as smartv Samsung Não tem durabilidade e também não tem vida útil.

Infelizmente, estou tendo uma experiência muito negativa com a Samsung .

text: I am extremely disappointed with the level of service provided by Samsung. I pre-ordered my mobile on January 26th, and at the time, I was informed that shipments would begin on February 4th. However, as of today, February 6th, I have not received any clear updates or proper communication from their customer service team. Every day, I am given a different explanation, and to my surprise, one of the customer service agents even told me that I would receive my mobile next week. This is completely unacceptable and reflects very poorly on Samsung's commitment to customer satisfaction. At this point, I regret pre-ordering the device directly from Samsung. I should have waited and purchased it from a retail store, as this pre-order process has been nothing but a hassle. The lack of transparency and delayed delivery has left me deeply frustrated.

text: I will no longer purchase Samsung brand products, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply doesn't appear anymore. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its useful life. Recent tests have indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in this group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company. I have no doubt about the position of Samsung Brazil, I am only doing my role as a consumer to inform people that Samsung smart TVs do not have durability and also do not have a useful life. Unfortunately, I am having a very negative experience with Samsung Global.

text:
Subject: Complaint Regarding Display Issue in Samsung Galaxy S22 Plus Post Software Update

Sir,

1. I am the owner of Samsung Galaxy S22 Plus smartphone bearing IMEI No:352497332883802
purchased the above phone on 20.07.2023.Despite being a loyal Samsung Customer, I am
deeply disappointed by the recent issue I have encountered with my device, which I believe
stems from the manufacturing or software-related fault.

2. Following the installation of a routine software update pushed by Samsung on 13.02. 2025, the
phone's display began exhibiting prominent pink line, rendering it nearly unusable for normal
purposes. This issue arose immediately after the update, directly pointing to a defect caused by
Samsung's software, which the hardware was evidently not built to handle

3. On 04.03.2025, I visited your authorized service center, located at Turney's samsung cafe kunnamkulam, Thrissur,  Initially, I was assured that the display defect would be addressed free of cost,
However, I was later informed that the repair would cost Rs.10,600/- (Ten  Thousand six hundred only) as the device was out of warranty. The above service
center has also issued me with a detailed estimate for the same. Though I have reached out to
Samsung customer support multiple times, despite assurances, no satisfactory resolution has
been provided. The defect caused by your software update remains unaddressed, causing me
significant inconvenience.

4. It is submitted that my phone has not suffered any physical damage till date and was functioning
properly until the software update. The afore-said defect is a result of a flaw in Samsung's
design or software, for which I am not responsible. A phone built without adequate capacity to
handle future software updates is a clear example of manufacturing negligence and defect. It is
unjust and unreasonable to demand payment for repairing an issue caused solely by Samsung's
own software update. Despite multiple attempts to seek resolution, he delay and lack of
accountability have caused significant mental stress and inconvenience. Apart from that, it is
held by various Consumer Dispute Redressal Commission that the manufacturer is responsible
for the defect (exhibiting vertical lines) caused by the software update, regardless of the device's
warranty status.

Hence I humbly request your good office to repair or replace the defective display of my device.
free of cost, without any delay, as the issue was caused by Samsung's own actions. I trust that Samsung
will handle this matter with the urgency and fairness it deserves, in line with its reputation for customer
satisfaction. Please respond within 7 days of receiving this complaint. If no action is taken within this
time, I will be compelled to seek legal remedies or escalate the matter to consumer forums for redressal.

Yours faithfully

text: I had a truly terrible experience with Samsung . I sent my S21+ in for repair, due to having lines on screen. When I sent the phone in, Samsung mentioned that the screen will be a free replacement. However, I will need to pay for any other parts that is faulty. I agreed to this T&C. After a few days, Samsung called me and mentioned that there are water stains in my phone, and I will need to pay SGD800+ for the repair, else I will need to forfeit the SGD54.50 service fee which I have paid. I got a shock upon hearing this. I told Samsung that the phone is still functioning properly, why should I pay SGD800+ for the repair? Samsung mentioned that it doesn't matter if the phone is or not. There is water stains in the phone which causes the Samsung phone test to fail, and regardless of whether the phone is functioning properly, Samsung will have to replace the motherboard of the phone and it costs SGD800+. Fyi, I did not drop the phone into water at all, and I do not know how the water stains came about. I agreeable to pay for the repair of any part that is faulty, but I am not agreeable to pay for parts that are still functioning, but just that there are water stains which make the Samsung test fail. Why should I pay to make my phone pass the Samsung test? I just want the phone to be working that's all, and the only part that needs to be replaced is the screen. In the end, I did not get my phone repaired and went to make a police report for this. This is a fraud and Samsung is trying to ask customers to pay for unnecessary repair.

The camera of my S25FE proved to be worst.
Pictures taken in the background of lights and in well lighted rooms give glare on picture. Flashes of lights appear in pictures.
Very bad experience with this camera, worse than ordinary phone.
Keypad is also malfunctioning. Adjacent keys to intended keys are sometimes pressed.
The worst part was customer service experience at service center srinagar jk india.. they are not ready to cooperate and acknowledge the issue. Very unprofessional. They need customer dealing training
Samsung look into the matter. I am your customer of 2 decades. Dont leave me at mercy of unprofessional service center people

text: I will no longer purchase Samsung brand products, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply doesn't appear anymore. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its useful life. Recent tests have indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in this group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company. I have no doubt about the position of Samsung  Brazil, I am only doing my role as a consumer to inform people that Samsung smart TVs do not have durability and also do not have a useful life. Unfortunately, I am having a very negative experienc Samsung Global.

text: Piekarnik samsunga kupiłem trzeciego listopada. Przyjechał zepsuty. Zgłoszenie tego samego dnia. Pierwsza naprawa nieudana. Druga nieudana. Serwisant twierdzi, że trzeba wymienić. Trzecia próba naprawy udana, ale piekarnik działa tylko tydzień i znowu ta sama usterka. Minął miesiąc od zakupu. Po tygodniu piekarnik został zabrany do wymiany. Potem przez 5 tygodni kolejne 3 próby naprawy. Wymiana dopiero 17ego stycznia !!! Przez ponad 2 miesiące nie mogłem używać piekarnika. Nie potrafiliście go naprawić lub wymienić. Za każdym razem jak dzwoniłem do serwisu lub samsunga nikt nic nie wiedział.

text: I will no longer purchase Samsung brand products, as their durability is questionable and, in many cases, disposable. I bought a QLED 4K Q65B TV in February 2022 and, currently, with less than two years of use, I am already facing problems; the image simply doesn't appear anymore. It's frustrating to invest over three thousand reais in a product and not be sure about its useful life. Recent tests have indicated that ELED technology can reach temperatures above 100 degrees, resulting in screen failures. I received a call from Samsung, where I was informed that some smart TVs did indeed have problems, but mine, which is QLED, was not included in this group. The only difference between Samsung's ELED and QLED is a layer of quantum dots, while the position of the LEDs remains the same, which does not justify the information provided by the company. I have no doubt about the position of Samsung Brazil, I am only doing my role as a consumer to inform people that Samsung smart TVs do not have durability and also do not have a useful life. Unfortunately, I am having a very negative experience with Samsung.

The world’s first #PrivacyDisplay on mobile. Meet your built-in privacy screen, only on #GalaxyS26Ultra. Privacy Display will allow you to protect your private information by hiding your full screen...
text:
I bought Galaxy Buds 3 Pro, a flagship product from a company that claims to be a leader in innovation.
What I got instead was months of wasted time, broken features, and a support system that seems designed to exhaust customers until they give up.

From day one, my Buds suffered from serious software-level failures:

• Voice commands almost never work
• Microphone doesn’t work for the first 7–10 seconds of every phone call
• Samsung’s own Voice Recorder ignores the Buds’ microphone
• Voice commands randomly stop working until I trigger Google Assistant

These are not “hardware damage” issues.
These are firmware / OS / Bluetooth stack failures.

So I did what Samsung asked.

I sent logs.
I sent advanced logs.
I uploaded files to Google Drive.
I waited weeks.
I waited months.
I stayed available for phone calls.
I missed calls that never came.
I was promised callbacks that were cancelled or never happened.

Samsung engineers:
• Asked for logs
• Said they got them
• Then said they didn’t
• Then said they did
• Then said they needed more
• Then stopped calling

After more than a month of me basically acting as Samsung’s QA engineer, the final result was:

“We couldn’t find the issue. Please pay for repair or buy a new pair.”

That is not customer service.
That is corporate abuse.

If you can’t reproduce a software bug, you don’t blame the customer.
You replace the product.

Instead, Samsung:
• Kept me stuck in support loops
• Used me to collect diagnostic data
• Wasted my time
• And then tried to make me pay for their failure

This is not how a premium brand behaves.

I am posting this so others know what really happens when your “smart” Samsung accessories stop working — you’re on your own.

Samsung, you can still fix this.
Replace the faulty unit and stop pretending this is my problem.

text:
Samsung  Team Pakistan 🇵🇰👑 really outdid themselves! The boneless chicken handi looked insanely inviting — rich, creamy, and packed with authentic desi flavors 😍🍲. The chicken was tender and perfectly coated in that luscious gravy, served in a traditional handi that added so much cultural charm ✨🔥. The soft naan on the side completed the suhoor setup beautifully 🌙🤤.

What stood out was the chefs’ precision and care — everything spotless, hygienic, and thoughtfully plated 👨‍🍳🧼. The combination of traditional presentation and bold flavors made it feel like a warm, comforting meal you just can’t resist ❤️🇵🇰. Definitely a dish that shows love, culture, and skill in every bite!

#GalaxyUnpacked #ramadan #suhoor #dubaifood

#UAENationalDay...

بمناسبة عيد الاتحاد الـ 54، يسعدنا أن نتقدم إلى أهل الإمارات، قيادة وشعباً، بأحر التهاني والتبريكات، متمنين لكم دوام العز والتقدم والازدهار. كل عام وإماراتنا الحبيبة بخير. 🇦🇪🤍✨

#UAENationalDay...
text:
# تحذير عاجل: خطر تصنيف الإمارات كدولة راعية للإرهاب

إلى المستثمرين وأصحاب الأموال في الإمارات ودبي،

الموضوع: تحذير من مخاطر قانونية ومالية وشيكة - سحب الاستثمارات الآن

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات #الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب #الفاشر_تنزف

#UAENationalDay...
text:
⚠️ Urgent Warning: Risk of UAE Being Classified as a Terror-Sponsoring State ⚠️

To investors and capital owners in the UAE and Dubai,

Subject: ⚠️ Immediate Legal and Financial Risk – Withdraw Your Investments Now ⚠️

The issue of certain entities in the UAE supporting the conflict in Sudan, and the resulting atrocities in El Fashir and elsewhere, has drawn the attention of the international community and human rights organizations.

This involvement places the United Arab Emirates on the brink of being classified as a "State Sponsoring Terrorism" or a "State Financing Conflict and Severe Human Rights Violations" by major international authorities.

What does this mean for you as investors?

⚠️ Asset Freeze: Your assets and investments in the UAE may be frozen or seized under international sanctions laws.

⚠️ Financial Sanctions: You will face severe difficulties with international banking transactions and strict restrictions on financial transfers.

⚠️ Reputational Damage: You could be listed among companies dealing with classified entities, destroying your reputation and closing global markets to you.

The decision now is a matter of self-protection:

Withdrawing your funds and investments from the UAE is not only an ethical stance — it is an urgent necessity to avoid imminent legal and financial catastrophe.

Do not wait for an official classification announcement. Act now to safeguard your capital from potential collapse.

⚠️ Immediate action is the only guarantee for the safety of your assets. ⚠️

#Withdraw_Investments_From_UAE #UAE_Funding_Terrorism #ElFashir_Bleeds

postTitle:

#GalaxyZTriFold #GalaxyAI #AIPhone
text:
My experience with Samsung — and why I’ve completely lost trust
I never thought a company as big as Samsung would handle a serious issue this poorly.
I submitted my Galaxy S23 5G at their authorized service centre in Aligarh (Choice Electronics) for display and battery issues. They assured me everything was replaced — but the records later showed otherwise.
Soon after that, I was scammed for ₹30,524 by someone using my exact Samsung service details.
He spoke like an official representative, had my complaint information, and used Samsung’s name to convince me — which clearly points to a data leak or misuse of customer data.
Instead of protecting the customer, Samsung:
ignored my emails and proofs
didn’t review call recordings already on their servers
relied only on the same service centre’s “reports”
kept forcing me to go back to the same centre where the problem began
and finally closed my case (Ref: 3101232291) without resolution or compensation
The “Experience Manager” assigned to my case even admitted she hadn’t fully reviewed the evidence.
Yet, the final answer was: “We can’t help.”
Samsung’s own app says they never ask for payments via UPI or external links — but when their system is used for fraud, they don’t take responsibility.
I reported this not just for myself — but so others don’t get trapped.
All I expected was accountability, a fair investigation, and compensation for the loss caused through Samsung’s negligence.
Instead, I’ve experienced silence, pressure, and case closure.
If this can happen to me, how many customers are silently suffering?
@SamsungIndia — you need to do better.
Customers deserve safety, honesty, and support — not blame-shifting and closed cases.
#Samsung #SamsungIndia #CustomerSupportFail #DataBreach #ScamAlert #NoAccountability #ConsumerRights #SamsungCare

"ISIS is rising while the world sleeps. The same heroes who gave 11,000 lives for global security are now being attacked by extremists. We need immediate international intervention to save Rojava! ☀️✌️ 

"In 2014, the Kurds stood alone to defeat ISIS for the world. Today, the world watches in silence as we face the same terror again. Rojava needs immediate protection—don't let history's greatest betrayal happen. 

"داعش لە کاتێکدا سەرهەڵدەدات کە جیهان خەوتووە. هەمان ئەو قارەمانانەی کە یازدە هەزار گیانیان بەخشی بۆ ئاسایشی جیهانی ئێستا لەلایەن توندڕەوەکانەوە هێرش دەکرێتە سەریان. پێویستمان بە دەستێوەردانی خێرای نێودەوڵەتی هەیە بۆ ڕزگارکردنی ڕۆژئاوا! ☀️✌️". 

 "لە ساڵی (دووهەزار و چواردە) کورد بە تەنیا وەستا بۆ شکستپێهێنانی داعش بۆ جیهان. ئەمڕۆ جیهان بە بێدەنگی تەماشای ئەوە دەکات کە دووبارە ڕووبەڕووی هەمان تیرۆر دەبینەوە. ڕۆژئاوا پێویستی بە پاراستنی دەستبەجێ هەیە- مەهێڵن گەورەترین خیانەتی مێژووی ڕووبدات".

text:
Some products are meant to be used with one hand, others with two — phones and iPads exist separately for a reason.

And the more moving parts a device has, the more vulnerable it becomes. That’s why we have different bikes for mountain trails and for racing, or different cars for off-roading and for NASCAR. Not everything can be perfectly combined into one product.

The tri-fold design is bold and promising, but current technology still isn’t durable enough to fully meet the expectations. It’s an impressive innovation, but it naturally comes with its own compromises.

So just be aware of the trade-offs — and enjoy its unique features.

In the end, it’s still a big congratulations to Samsung for pushing the limits of what a phone can be!

text:
Economic Conscience Call: No to Funding Bloodshed in Sudan!

To all investors, companies, and financial institutions operating in #UAE and #Dubai:

Would you accept that your capital fuels a war machine that kills innocent people in #Sudan?

International reports confirm the involvement of entities in the UAE in supporting and arming militias responsible for atrocities and crimes against humanity, most recently the horrific #ElFashir massacre.

Our message is clear and decisive:

1. Immediately withdraw or freeze your investments in the UAE and Dubai as an ethical and humanitarian step to protect your reputation.

2. Declare your stance clearly: Responsible investment cannot be complicit in financing violence and human rights violations.

Ethical and financial risks follow you: Continuing means you are "silent partners" in these crimes. Do not let your profits be stained with the blood of innocents.

#Economic_Boycott_UAE #Stop_Sudan_War #ElFashir_Bleeds #Withdraw_Investments

text:
일러가로되 하나님은 단 한분이시고
하나님은 영원하시며
성자와 성부도 두지 않으셨으 며
그분과 대등한 것 세상에 없 노라
하나님 외에는 신이 없나니 그분은 보이지 않는 것과 보이는 것도 알고 계시는 자비로우시고 자애로우신 분이시라
하나님 외에는 신이 없으며 그분은 왕이시요 성스러운 분이 시며 평화를 주시고 안전을 수여 하시는 분이며 모든 것을 지켜주 시는 분이시며 가장 위대하시고 권세와 모든 위대함의 소유자이시 라 그들이 비유하는 모든 것 위에 계신 하나님께 영광이 있으소서
이분이 창조주 하나님으로창조하시는 분이요 형상을 만드 는 분이시라 가장 훌륭한 이름들은 그분의 것이며 하늘과 대지에있는 모든 것들이 그분께 영광을드리나니 실로 그분은 권능과 지혜로 충만하심이라
천지의 왕국이 하나님 안에 있어 생명을 주시고 생명을 앗아 가시는 분은 그분이시라 실로 그 분은 모든 일에 전지전능하심이라
그분은 태초에도 계셨고 마 지막에도 계시며 현존해 계시되 나타나지 아니하시나 모든 것을 알고 계시니라
그분은 하늘과 대지를 엿새 동안에 창조한 후 권좌로 오르셨 나니 대지 속에 들어가는 것과 그곳에서 나오는 것과 하늘에서 내려오는 것과 그곳으로 을라가 는 것 모두를 알고 계시며 너희 가 있는 곳에 항상 함께 하시매 너희가 행하는 모든 것을 지켜보 고 계시니라
하늘과 대지가 하나님 안에 있으며 모든 것이 하나님께로 귀 의하노라
그분은 밤을 낮으로 바꾸시고 낮을 밤으로 바꾸시며 심중에 있 는 모든 것을 아시노라
하나님 외에는 신이 없나니그분은 살아계시사 영원하시며 모 든 것을 주관 하시도다 졸음도 잠 도 그분을 엄습하지 못하도다 천 지의 모든 것이 그분의 것이니 그 분의 허락없이 어느 누가 하나님 앞에서 중재할 수 있으랴 그분은 그들의 안중과 뒤에 있는 모든 것 을 알고 계시며 그들은 그분에 대 하여 그분이 허락한 것 외에는 그 분의 지식을 아무것도 모르니라 권자가 천지위에 펼쳐져 있어 그 것을 보호하는데 피곤하지 아니하 시니 그분은 가장 위에 계시며 장 엄하시노라
천지에 있는 어떤 것도 하나 님께는 은폐될 수 없노라.
하나님은 그분의 의지에 따라 자궁속에서 너희를 만드시니 그 분 외에는 신이 없으며 그분은 권 능과 지혜로 충만하심이라
하나님의 종교는 이슬람 이슬람 외에 다른 종교를 추구하는 자 결코 수락되지 않을 것이니 내세에서 패망자 가운데 있게되리라
일러가로되 권능의 왕이신 하나님이여 당신은 당신의 뜻대로권능을 주시기도 하고 권능을 빼 앗기도 하시며 또 영광과 천함을 주시나니 당신의 손안에 모든 영 광이 있나이다 진실로 당신은 모 든 일에 전지전능하시도다 당신은 밤을 낮으로 하고 낮을 밤으로 하시며 죽은것을 살게 하고 살아 있는 것을 죽게 하시며당신이 원하는 자에게 풍성한 양 식을 주시도다
그분은 나를 창조하셨고 또 나를 인도하시며
그분은 나에게 일용할 양식 을 주시고 마실 음료수를 주시며
내가 병들었을 때 나를 치료하여 주시며
나의 생명을 앗아가신 후 생명을 주시는 분이시며
하나님은 만물의 창조주이자 모든 것을 주관하시는 분으로
하늘과 대지의 열쇠들이 그분께 있어 하나님의 말씀을 거역한 그들에게는 손실만 있을 뿐이라
너희를 위해 대지를 안식처 로 하사 하늘을 지붕으로 하고 너희를 창조하사 가장 아름다운 형 체로 지으셨으며 좋은 양식을 부 여하신 분이 바로 하나님이시라 너희 주님 하나님은 그러하시니라그러므로 만유의 주님이신 하나님이여 축복을 받으소서
하늘과 대지의 주권은 하나 님 안에 있어 그분께서 뜻을 두시고 계획한 것을 창조 하시며 그분의 뜻과 계획에 따라 남아와 여아를 주시니라 그분은 남성과 여성을 다같 이 두시고 또한 그분의 뜻과 계획에 따라 불임으로 두시니 실로 그분은 아심과 능력으로 충만하시니라

text:
HP Logo
Write a review

Review of Samsung South Africa
#34
Ranked In Electronics & Technology
0 NPS
Recommended: Unlikely
i

SR

Sherissa R
1 review | Active since Dec 2025
 11 Dec 2025 at 10:42
Samsung exploded
On the morning of 23 November, I put my Samsung A54 on charge as the battery was less than 10%. I turned around to go back to sleep, about 15 min later I heard an explosion, when I turned around my phone was on fire on my bedside table. Out of shock I hit the phone and it landed on my carpet. I grabbed the phone and threw it in the bath to stop the fire. My carpet got burned and my hand had small blisters.
My phone was less than 20 months old. The box indicated 24 month warranty.

I sent Samsung an email as this could have been worse. My curtains are less than 15cm away from my bedside table and my house could have cought fire.

Samsung sent a courier and collected the phone. The result, the battery exploded due to external force? I have never let my phone fall, or bumped it against something? I was asleep when the phone cought fire? They blame me for the phone exploding? How is this possible? I have been a Samsung fan since the smartphones launched. I am so disappointed in the service and the feedback. I used my samsung cable provided and a SAMSUNG adapter, yet still this is my fault? What more should I have done to keep my 19 month old phone "safe" from exploding? This phone was bought on contract, not from a cheap shop.

Samsung, if this were another company, I do believe the damages would have been paid or the phone at least replaced!! I had to borrow a phone as I am without one! Horrible service!

text:
일러가로되 하나님은 단 한분이시고
하나님은 영원하시며
성자와 성부도 두지 않으셨으 며
그분과 대등한 것 세상에 없 노라
하나님 외에는 신이 없나니 그분은 보이지 않는 것과 보이는 것도 알고 계시는 자비로우시고 자애로우신 분이시라
하나님 외에는 신이 없으며 그분은 왕이시요 성스러운 분이 시며 평화를 주시고 안전을 수여 하시는 분이며 모든 것을 지켜주 시는 분이시며 가장 위대하시고 권세와 모든 위대함의 소유자이시 라 그들이 비유하는 모든 것 위에 계신 하나님께 영광이 있으소서
이분이 창조주 하나님으로창조하시는 분이요 형상을 만드 는 분이시라 가장 훌륭한 이름들은 그분의 것이며 하늘과 대지에있는 모든 것들이 그분께 영광을드리나니 실로 그분은 권능과 지혜로 충만하심이라
천지의 왕국이 하나님 안에 있어 생명을 주시고 생명을 앗아 가시는 분은 그분이시라 실로 그 분은 모든 일에 전지전능하심이라
그분은 태초에도 계셨고 마 지막에도 계시며 현존해 계시되 나타나지 아니하시나 모든 것을 알고 계시니라
그분은 하늘과 대지를 엿새 동안에 창조한 후 권좌로 오르셨 나니 대지 속에 들어가는 것과 그곳에서 나오는 것과 하늘에서 내려오는 것과 그곳으로 을라가 는 것 모두를 알고 계시며 너희 가 있는 곳에 항상 함께 하시매 너희가 행하는 모든 것을 지켜보 고 계시니라
하늘과 대지가 하나님 안에 있으며 모든 것이 하나님께로 귀 의하노라
그분은 밤을 낮으로 바꾸시고 낮을 밤으로 바꾸시며 심중에 있 는 모든 것을 아시노라
하나님 외에는 신이 없나니그분은 살아계시사 영원하시며 모 든 것을 주관 하시도다 졸음도 잠 도 그분을 엄습하지 못하도다 천 지의 모든 것이 그분의 것이니 그 분의 허락없이 어느 누가 하나님 앞에서 중재할 수 있으랴 그분은 그들의 안중과 뒤에 있는 모든 것 을 알고 계시며 그들은 그분에 대 하여 그분이 허락한 것 외에는 그 분의 지식을 아무것도 모르니라 권자가 천지위에 펼쳐져 있어 그 것을 보호하는데 피곤하지 아니하 시니 그분은 가장 위에 계시며 장 엄하시노라
천지에 있는 어떤 것도 하나 님께는 은폐될 수 없노라.
하나님은 그분의 의지에 따라 자궁속에서 너희를 만드시니 그 분 외에는 신이 없으며 그분은 권 능과 지혜로 충만하심이라
하나님의 종교는 이슬람 이슬람 외에 다른 종교를 추구하는 자 결코 수락되지 않을 것이니 내세에서 패망자 가운데 있게되리라
일러가로되 권능의 왕이신 하나님이여 당신은 당신의 뜻대로권능을 주시기도 하고 권능을 빼 앗기도 하시며 또 영광과 천함을 주시나니 당신의 손안에 모든 영 광이 있나이다 진실로 당신은 모 든 일에 전지전능하시도다 당신은 밤을 낮으로 하고 낮을 밤으로 하시며 죽은것을 살게 하고 살아 있는 것을 죽게 하시며당신이 원하는 자에게 풍성한 양 식을 주시도다
그분은 나를 창조하셨고 또 나를 인도하시며
그분은 나에게 일용할 양식 을 주시고 마실 음료수를 주시며
내가 병들었을 때 나를 치료하여 주시며
나의 생명을 앗아가신 후 생명을 주시는 분이시며
하나님은 만물의 창조주이자 모든 것을 주관하시는 분으로
하늘과 대지의 열쇠들이 그분께 있어 하나님의 말씀을 거역한 그들에게는 손실만 있을 뿐이라
너희를 위해 대지를 안식처 로 하사 하늘을 지붕으로 하고 너희를 창조하사 가장 아름다운 형 체로 지으셨으며 좋은 양식을 부 여하신 분이 바로 하나님이시라 너희 주님 하나님은 그러하시니라그러므로 만유의 주님이신 하나님이여 축복을 받으소서
하늘과 대지의 주권은 하나 님 안에 있어 그분께서 뜻을 두시고 계획한 것을 창조 하시며 그분의 뜻과 계획에 따라 남아와 여아를 주시니라 그분은 남성과 여성을 다같 이 두시고 또한 그분의 뜻과 계획에 따라 불임으로 두시니 실로 그분은 아심과 능력으로 충만하시니라

#GalaxyZTriFold #GalaxyAI #AIPhone
text:
بصراحة، اللي حصل معايا من سامسونج لا يليق إطلاقًا باسم شركة عالمية ولا بسعر المنتج اللي اشتريته.

اشتريت شاشة سامسونج من سنتين فقط، وسعرها أكتر من 30,000 جنيه. المفروض منتج بالقيمة دي يعيش سنين بدون أعطال كبيرة… لكن اللي حصل عكس ده تمامًا.

البانل والليد اتحرقوا مرتين قبل كده واتصلحوا في الضمان.
والنهارده وبعد انتهاء الضمان بفترة بسيطة، نفس العطل للمرة التالتة!

رحت التوكيل لقيت إن تكلفة الإصلاح 13,450 جنيه، ولما سألت عن سبب تكرار نفس العطل كان رد موظف الشكاوى صادم:
"هنعملك خصم على التصليح أو 15% على شاشة جديدة… ولو مش عاجبك اشتكينا لأي جهة."

غير كده، أنا بقالي أكتر من أسبوع بتواصل وبحايل على خدمة الشكاوى عشان حد يكلمني أو ياخد الموضوع بجدية… ومفيش أي اهتمام.

هو ده التعامل مع عميل اشترى شاشة بـ30 ألف؟
هو ده العمر الافتراضي لمنتج بالسعر ده؟ سنتين بس؟
وهل طبيعي إن نفس الجزء في الشاشة يبوز 3 مرات وراء بعض؟!

اللي بيحصل ده مش صدفة… ده عيب واضح ومتكرر والشركة رافضة تتحمل مسؤولية منتج فيه مشكلة أصلاً من أول سنة.

أنا بكتب البوست ده عشان أوضح للناس التجربة اللي مريت بيها، ويمكن حد من سامسونج يراجع الطريقة دي لأنها فعلاً غير مقبولة.

text:
# تحذير عاجل: خطر تصنيف الإمارات كدولة راعية للإرهاب

إلى المستثمرين وأصحاب الأموال في الإمارات ودبي،

الموضوع: تحذير من مخاطر قانونية ومالية وشيكة - سحب الاستثمارات الآن

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات
#الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب
 #الفاشر_تنزف

الشيطان ابن زايد، شرُّ من مشى على الأرض‼️

اللهم احصهم عدداً، واقتلهم بدداً، ولا تغادر منهم أحداً.
اللهم اجعلهم عبرة للطغاة، ونكالاً للظالمين.
اللهم أرنا فيهم بأسك الذي لا يُرد، وسلطانك الذي لا يُقهر.
اللهم لا ترفع لهم راية، ولا تحقق لهم غاية، واجعلهم لمن خلفهم آية🤲🤲🤲🤲

text:
# تحذير عاجل: خطر تصنيف الإمارات كدولة راعية للإرهاب

إلى المستثمرين وأصحاب الأموال في الإمارات ودبي،

الموضوع: تحذير من مخاطر قانونية ومالية وشيكة - سحب الاستثمارات الآن

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات #الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب #الفاشر_تنزف

text:
Economic Conscience Call: No to Funding Bloodshed in Sudan!

To all investors, companies, and financial institutions operating in #UAE and #Dubai:

Would you accept that your capital fuels a war machine that kills innocent people in #Sudan?

International reports confirm the involvement of entities in the UAE in supporting and arming militias responsible for atrocities and crimes against humanity, most recently the horrific #ElFashir massacre.

Our message is clear and decisive:

1. Immediately withdraw or freeze your investments in the UAE and Dubai as an ethical and humanitarian step to protect your reputation.

2. Declare your stance clearly: Responsible investment cannot be complicit in financing violence and human rights violations.

Ethical and financial risks follow you: Continuing means you are "silent partners" in these crimes. Do not let your profits be stained with the blood of innocents.

#Economic_Boycott_UAE #Stop_Sudan_War #ElFashir_Bleeds #Withdraw_Investments

(Share this call to reach every decision-maker)

text:
# نداء الضمير الاقتصادي: لا لتمويل الدم في السودان!

إلى كل مستثمر وشركة ومؤسسة مالية تعمل في #الإمارات و #دبي:

هل تقبلون أن تكون رؤوس أموالكم وقوداً لآلة الحرب التي تقتل الأبرياء في #السودان؟

التقارير الدولية تؤكد تورط جهات في الإمارات في دعم وتسليح الميليشيات المسؤولة عن الفظائع والجرائم ضد الإنسانية، وآخرها مجزرة #الفاشر المروعة.

**رسالتنا واضحة وحاسمة:**
1.  **سحب أو تجميد استثماراتكم فوراً** من الإمارات ودبي، كخطوة أخلاقية وإنسانية لحماية سمعتكم.
2.  **إعلان موقفكم بوضوح:** الاستثمار المسؤول لا يمكن أن يتواطأ مع تمويل العنف والانتهاكات.

**المخاطر الأخلاقية والمالية تلاحقكم:** استمراركم يعني أنكم "شركاء صامتون" في هذه الجرائم. لا تجعلوا أرباحكم تتلوث بدماء الأبرياء.

#مقاطعة_اقتصادية_للإمارات #اوقفوا_حرب_السودان #الفاشر_تنزف #سحب_الاستثمارات

(شارك هذا النداء ليصل إلى كل صاحب قرار)

*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

text:
Economic Conscience Call: No to Funding Bloodshed in Sudan!

To all investors, companies, and financial institutions operating in #UAE and #Dubai:

Would you accept that your capital fuels a war machine that kills innocent people in #Sudan?

International reports confirm the involvement of entities in the UAE in supporting and arming militias responsible for atrocities and crimes against humanity, most recently the horrific #ElFashir massacre.

Our message is clear and decisive:

1. Immediately withdraw or freeze your investments in the UAE and Dubai as an ethical and humanitarian step to protect your reputation.

2. Declare your stance clearly: Responsible investment cannot be complicit in financing violence and human rights violations.

Ethical and financial risks follow you: Continuing means you are "silent partners" in these crimes. Do not let your profits be stained with the blood of innocents.

#Economic_Boycott_UAE #Stop_Sudan_War #ElFashir_Bleeds #Withdraw_Investments

(Share this call to reach every decision-maker)

text:
# تحذير عاجل: خطر تصنيف الإمارات كدولة راعية للإرهاب

إلى المستثمرين وأصحاب الأموال في الإمارات ودبي،

الموضوع: تحذير من مخاطر قانونية ومالية وشيكة - سحب الاستثمارات الآن

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات
#الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب
 #الفاشر_تنزف

🛑🛑تنويه هام جدا جدا جدا🛑🛑

🚦محدش يشتري من سامسونج اجهزة🚦

👈اشتريت ثلاجة سامسونج سعرها يتعدي ال ٧٢ الف جنيه مصري ضمان ١٠ سنوات و بعد السنة الثالثة التلاجة باظت و كلمت شركة #سامسونج و تم تغير البوردة(اهم قطعة و اغلي قطعة في الجهاز) و وعدوني ان المشكلة مش هتتكرر بعد مرور اقل من ٦ شهور اتكررت المشكلة و غيروا البوردة و الحساس و المروحة و وعدوني لو المشكلة اتكررت التلاجة سوف يتم تغيرها بعد اقل من شهر التلاجة باظت تاني كلمت الشركة لتغير التلاجة و رفضت الإصلاح و تم بالفعل إرسال فني مرتين و تم التأكيد من قبل الفني ان التلاجة بها نفس المشكلة و بعد مرور أسبوع اتصل بيا قسم الشكاوي و بلغوني برد الادارة رفض التغير و ان #سامسونج هتسحب الجهاز عندهم للاصلاح( و أنا اقعد من غير تلاجة 😂😂) و يصلحوها و يبعتوها تاني لو المشكلة اتكررت هنغيرهالك
رفضت و طلبت بتغير الثلاجة

🚦🚦المشكلة هنا ان التلاجة كانت شوية بتشتغل و شوية بتفصل و كان فيها ادوية لطفل لم يتعدي عمرها السنتان جالوه infection و احتمال و ليس أكيد أنها بسبب ان التلاجة بوظت الأدوية بتاعته🚦🚦

text:
# نداء الضمير الاقتصادي: لا لتمويل الدم في السودان!

إلى كل مستثمر وشركة ومؤسسة مالية تعمل في #الإمارات و #دبي:

هل تقبلون أن تكون رؤوس أموالكم وقوداً لآلة الحرب التي تقتل الأبرياء في #السودان؟

التقارير الدولية تؤكد تورط جهات في الإمارات في دعم وتسليح الميليشيات المسؤولة عن الفظائع والجرائم ضد الإنسانية، وآخرها مجزرة #الفاشر المروعة.

**رسالتنا واضحة وحاسمة:**
1.  **سحب أو تجميد استثماراتكم فوراً** من الإمارات ودبي، كخطوة أخلاقية وإنسانية لحماية سمعتكم.
2.  **إعلان موقفكم بوضوح:** الاستثمار المسؤول لا يمكن أن يتواطأ مع تمويل العنف والانتهاكات.

**المخاطر الأخلاقية والمالية تلاحقكم:** استمراركم يعني أنكم "شركاء صامتون" في هذه الجرائم. لا تجعلوا أرباحكم تتلوث بدماء الأبرياء.

text:
⚠️ Urgent Warning: Risk of UAE Being Classified as a Terror-Sponsoring State ⚠️

To investors and capital owners in the UAE and Dubai,

Subject: ⚠️ Immediate Legal and Financial Risk – Withdraw Your Investments Now ⚠️

The issue of certain entities in the UAE supporting the conflict in Sudan, and the resulting atrocities in El Fashir and elsewhere, has drawn the attention of the international community and human rights organizations.

This involvement places the United Arab Emirates on the brink of being classified as a "State Sponsoring Terrorism" or a "State Financing Conflict and Severe Human Rights Violations" by major international authorities.

What does this mean for you as investors?

⚠️ Asset Freeze: Your assets and investments in the UAE may be frozen or seized under international sanctions laws.

⚠️ Financial Sanctions: You will face severe difficulties with international banking transactions and strict restrictions on financial transfers.

⚠️ Reputational Damage: You could be listed among companies dealing with classified entities, destroying your reputation and closing global markets to you.

The decision now is a matter of self-protection:

Withdrawing your funds and investments from the UAE is not only an ethical stance — it is an urgent necessity to avoid imminent legal and financial catastrophe.

Do not wait for an official classification announcement. Act now to safeguard your capital from potential collapse.

⚠️ Immediate action is the only guarantee for the safety of your assets. ⚠️

#Withdraw_Investments_From_UAE #UAE_Funding_Terrorism #ElFashir_Bleeds

# تحذير عاجل: خطر تصنيف الإمارات كدولة راعية للإرهاب

إلى المستثمرين وأصحاب الأموال في الإمارات ودبي،

الموضوع: تحذير من مخاطر قانونية ومالية وشيكة - سحب الاستثمارات الآن

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات
#الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب

text:
Economic Conscience Call: No to Funding Bloodshed in Sudan!

To all investors, companies, and financial institutions operating in #UAE and #Dubai:

Would you accept that your capital fuels a war machine that kills innocent people in #Sudan?

International reports confirm the involvement of entities in the UAE in supporting and arming militias responsible for atrocities and crimes against humanity, most recently the horrific #ElFashir massacre.

Our message is clear and decisive:

1. Immediately withdraw or freeze your investments in the UAE and Dubai as an ethical and humanitarian step to protect your reputation.

2. Declare your stance clearly: Responsible investment cannot be complicit in financing violence and human rights violations.

Ethical and financial risks follow you: Continuing means you are "silent partners" in these crimes. Do not let your profits be stained with the blood of innocents.

#Economic_Boycott_UAE #Stop_Sudan_War #ElFashir_Bleeds #Withdraw_Investments

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات
#الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب
 #الفاشر_تنزف

Economic Conscience Call: No to Funding Bloodshed in Sudan!

To all investors, companies, and financial institutions operating in #UAE and #Dubai:

Would you accept that your capital fuels a war machine that kills innocent people in #Sudan?

International reports confirm the involvement of entities in the UAE in supporting and arming militias responsible for atrocities and crimes against humanity, most recently the horrific #ElFashir massacre.

Our message is clear and decisive:

1. Immediately withdraw or freeze your investments in the UAE and Dubai as an ethical and humanitarian step to protect your reputation.

2. Declare your stance clearly: Responsible investment cannot be complicit in financing violence and human rights violations.

Ethical and financial risks follow you: Continuing means you are "silent partners" in these crimes. Do not let your profits be stained with the blood of innocents.

#Economic_Boycott_UAE #Stop_Sudan_War #ElFashir_Bleeds #Withdraw_Investments

(Share this call to reach every decision-maker)

# نداء الضمير الاقتصادي: لا لتمويل الدم في السودان!

إلى كل مستثمر وشركة ومؤسسة مالية تعمل في #الإمارات و #دبي:

هل تقبلون أن تكون رؤوس أموالكم وقوداً لآلة الحرب التي تقتل الأبرياء في #السودان؟

التقارير الدولية تؤكد تورط جهات في الإمارات في دعم وتسليح الميليشيات المسؤولة عن الفظائع والجرائم ضد الإنسانية، وآخرها مجزرة #الفاشر المروعة.

**رسالتنا واضحة وحاسمة:**
1.  **سحب أو تجميد استثماراتكم فوراً** من الإمارات ودبي، كخطوة أخلاقية وإنسانية لحماية سمعتكم.
2.  **إعلان موقفكم بوضوح:** الاستثمار المسؤول لا يمكن أن يتواطأ مع تمويل العنف والانتهاكات.

**المخاطر الأخلاقية والمالية تلاحقكم:** استمراركم يعني أنكم "شركاء صامتون" في هذه الجرائم. لا تجعلوا أرباحكم تتلوث بدماء الأبرياء.

#مقاطعة_اقتصادية_للإمارات #اوقفوا_حرب_السودان #الفاشر_تنزف #سحب_الاستثمارات

(شارك هذا النداء ليصل إلى كل صاحب قرار)

text:
# تحذير عاجل: خطر تصنيف الإمارات كدولة راعية للإرهاب

إلى المستثمرين وأصحاب الأموال في الإمارات ودبي،

الموضوع: تحذير من مخاطر قانونية ومالية وشيكة - سحب الاستثمارات الآن

لقد أصبحت قضية دعم جهات في دولة الإمارات للصراع في السودان، وما ترتب عليها من فظائع في الفاشر وغيرها، محط أنظار المجتمع الدولي والمنظمات الحقوقية.

هذا التورط يضع دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة على حافة التصنيف كـ "دولة راعية للإرهاب" أو "دولة تمول الصراع والانتهاكات الجسيمة لحقوق الإنسان" من قبل جهات دولية كبرى.

ماذا يعني هذا لكم كمستثمرين؟

*   **تجميد الأصول:** قد تتعرض أصولكم واستثماراتكم في الإمارات للتجميد أو المصادرة بموجب قوانين العقوبات الدولية.
*   **عقوبات مالية:** ستواجهون صعوبات بالغة في التعاملات البنكية الدولية، وستُفرض قيود صارمة على التحويلات المالية.
*   **خسارة السمعة:** سيتم إدراجكم ضمن قوائم الشركات التي تتعامل مع كيانات مصنفة، مما يدمر سمعتكم ويغلق عليكم أسواقاً عالمية.

القرار الآن هو قرار حماية ذاتية:

سحب أموالكم واستثماراتكم من الإمارات ليس مجرد موقف أخلاقي، بل هو ضرورة قصوى لتجنب كارثة قانونية ومالية وشيكة.

لا تنتظروا الإعلان الرسمي عن التصنيف. تحركوا الآن لحماية رؤوس أموالكم من الانهيار المحتمل.

التحرك الفوري هو الضمان الوحيد لسلامة أصولكم.

#سحب_الاستثمارات_من_الإمارات
#الإمارات_تمول_الإرهاب
 #الفاشر_تنزف

text:
Economic Conscience Call: No to Funding Bloodshed in Sudan!

To all investors, companies, and financial institutions operating in #UAE and #Dubai:

Would you accept that your capital fuels a war machine that kills innocent people in #Sudan?

International reports confirm the involvement of entities in the UAE in supporting and arming militias responsible for atrocities and crimes against humanity, most recently the horrific #ElFashir massacre.

Our message is clear and decisive:

1. Immediately withdraw or freeze your investments in the UAE and Dubai as an ethical and humanitarian step to protect your reputation.

2. Declare your stance clearly: Responsible investment cannot be complicit in financing violence and human rights violations.

Ethical and financial risks follow you: Continuing means you are "silent partners" in these crimes. Do not let your profits be stained with the blood of innocents.

#Economic_Boycott_UAE #Stop_Sudan_War #ElFashir_Bleeds #Withdraw_Investments

(Share this call to reach every decision-maker)
